query:
SELECT `key`, `value` FROM workflow_settings 
WHERE `key` IN (
  'production_loop_enabled','production_mode','production_interval_minutes',
  'max_daily_articles','max_batch_high','max_batch_medium',
  'min_score_to_publish','score_high_threshold','score_medium_threshold',
  'pool_min_size','brand_genre','candidate_expiry_hours',
  'expiry_breaking_hours','expiry_trending_hours','expiry_evergreen_hours',
  'score_decay_hours'
)
ORDER BY `key`;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wfbAGRs7AVLkN4.90cd9747513f --database 4wsqNcW8uBjUqkvadz54Yt --execute SELECT `key`, `value` FROM workflow_settings 
WHERE `key` IN (
  'production_loop_enabled','production_mode','production_interval_minutes',
  'max_daily_articles','max_batch_high','max_batch_medium',
  'min_score_to_publish','score_high_threshold','score_medium_threshold',
  'pool_min_size','brand_genre','candidate_expiry_hours',
  'expiry_breaking_hours','expiry_trending_hours','expiry_evergreen_hours',
  'score_decay_hours'
)
ORDER BY `key`;
